title: Squirrel Removal in Clinton Hill, Brooklyn | $900–$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Clinton Hill, Brooklyn. Humane extraction, damage repair & prevention. Licensed experts. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Clinton Hill residents know that squirrels are a common sight in the neighborhood's tree-lined streets, but when they invade your home, they can cause serious damage to attics, insulation, and wiring. Best Pest Control NYC provides expert squirrel removal services throughout Clinton Hill, from the historic brownstones near Pratt Institute to the residential blocks surrounding Fort Greene Park. Our humane removal process ensures your home is squirrel-free and protected against future invasions.
whyUs: With over a decade of experience serving Brooklyn neighborhoods, Best Pest Control NYC understands the unique challenges of Clinton Hill's mix of historic homes and modern buildings. Our licensed technicians use humane, effective methods and provide comprehensive repairs to seal entry points and prevent re-infestation, all backed by our satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Clinton Hill's beautiful tree canopy and proximity to Fort Greene Park create an ideal habitat for squirrels, but the neighborhood's century-old brownstones and limestone townhouses often have vulnerable roof joints and eaves that squirrels exploit. The historic architecture around the Pratt Institute area and along Washington Avenue requires specialized knowledge to properly seal without damaging original materials.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Clinton Hill?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Clinton Hill typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage repair needed. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work, sanitization, and sealing entry points to prevent future problems.

faqs.question: Are squirrels common in Clinton Hill brownstones?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels are very common in Clinton Hill due to the mature trees and older buildings. Brownstones and historic homes often have small gaps in rooflines, soffits, and chimneys that squirrels use to access attics. Once inside, they can cause significant damage to insulation, electrical wiring, and wooden structures.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Clinton Hill home?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removals in Clinton Hill are completed within 3-7 days, depending on the number of squirrels and their location. We begin with a thorough inspection, install one-way exclusion devices that allow squirrels to leave but not return, and then seal all entry points once we confirm all animals have been removed.

faqs.question: Will squirrels damage my historic Clinton Hill home?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels can cause extensive damage to historic homes by chewing through wood, insulation, and electrical wiring, creating fire hazards. They also leave droppings and urine that can contaminate insulation and create health risks. Our team is experienced in working with Clinton Hill's historic architecture and uses methods that protect the integrity of original materials while effectively excluding squirrels.
